public.hero_title: Get a ride anywhere in Mauritius
public.hero_sub: Book a trusted taxi anywhere on the island — from SSR Airport to Grand Baie, Flic en Flac to Le Morne. No account, no upfront payment. Just the ride.
public.partners_label: Trusted by partners in tourism & hospitality
public.how_sub: No sign-up, no card details, no hassle. Enter where you are, where you're going, and we'll match you with a trusted driver nearby.
public.step1_body: Tell us where to grab you and where you're headed. Airport, hotel, beach, village — we cover every corner of the island.
public.step2_body: Distance, duration, and an honest estimated cost before you book. No surge. No surprises. You pay the driver directly, in cash or by card.
public.step3_body: Post your booking and verified drivers nearby accept in seconds. We send you name, photo, car and plate, so you know exactly who's coming.
public.calc_heading: Know the price, before you ride.
public.calc_sub: Every route is priced from real-world distance and road conditions — airport runs, coastal drives, cross-island transfers. What you see is what you'll be asked to pay.
public.calc_bullet1: Base fare + per-km rate, configurable at the operator level
public.calc_bullet2: Airport pickup surcharge baked in where applicable
public.calc_bullet3: Night tariff (22:00 – 05:00) clearly flagged before booking
public.calc_bullet4: Pay the driver directly — cash, card, or local mobile money
public.widget_note: * Estimate only. Final fare is set by the driver and shown before confirmation.
public.driver_sub: Already running a taxi in Mauritius? Join the platform, complete verification, and start receiving bookings the same week. You keep every rupee you're paid — we just connect the ride.
public.perk1_desc: Upload your National ID, driving licence, and PSV licence. We review in 48 hours.
public.perk2_desc: Riders pay you directly. We never touch your income — we charge drivers a flat monthly package, not a commission.
public.perk3_desc: Accept up to 5 bookings a month on the free tier. Upgrade any time to unlock more.
public.cta_sub: Whether it's a 2 a.m. airport run or a Sunday trip to Le Morne — Mauritian Rides connects you to a verified driver in under a minute.
public.blog_sub: Routes, tips, and local knowledge for getting around the island.

auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

booking.title: Book a ride
booking.location_denied: Location permission is off. Enter pickup on the map instead.
booking.create_failed: Could not create the booking. Try again.
booking.step1_sub: No sign up needed. Just tell us where to pick you up and where you're headed.
booking.step2_sub: A driver will call this number once they accept your ride.
booking.fee_notice_body: Mauritian Rides never charges riders — no booking fees, no commission.
booking.success_body: Your booking is live. A verified driver nearby will accept any second now.
booking.success_waiting: Waiting for a driver to accept…

tracker.title: Your ride
tracker.waiting_location: Waiting for the driver to share location…

trips.title: Your trips
trips.empty: No rides yet. Book your first ride.

driver.feed_empty: No open rides right now. Pull to refresh.
driver.cap_reached: Monthly cap reached. Upgrade your plan to accept more rides.
driver.race_lost: Another driver accepted this ride first.
driver.accept_failed: Could not accept the ride. Try again.
driver.live_share_active: Sharing your location with the rider
driver.live_share_start_failed: Could not start location sharing. Please enable location permissions.
driver.location_denied: Location permission denied. The ride has been cancelled.
driver.upgrade_cta: Upgrade to accept more rides this month
driver.upgrade_failed: Could not open the upgrade page. Try again.
driver.status_pending_sub: We're verifying your documents. You'll be live within 48 hours.
driver.status_bgcheck_sub: Your documents are under review. We'll notify you once complete.
driver.status_suspended_sub: Your account is suspended. Contact support to resolve.
driver.current_ride_release_hint: Releasing reopens the booking for another driver. Use only if circumstances change.
driver.current_ride_end_confirm_body: Mark the ride as completed and collect payment from the rider.
driver.current_ride_release_confirm_body: This will reopen the booking for another driver. Only do this if you can't complete the ride.
driver.doc_step_headshot_sub: A clear photo of your face. No sunglasses.
driver.doc_step_nid_sub: Front and back of your National Identity Card.
driver.docs_subtitle: Upload your documents to start accepting rides.
driver.docs_under_review: Your documents are under review. Replacements are locked until the review is complete.
driver.docs_submit_hint: All documents uploaded. Submit for admin review.
driver.profile_phone_hint: Phone changes require OTP verification — coming soon.
driver.profile_pw_hint: Leave blank to keep current password.
driver.profile_save_failed: Failed to save profile. Try again.
driver.plan_faq_billing_a: You're billed at the start of each month. Your cap resets on the same day.
driver.plan_faq_cancel_a: Yes. You keep access until the end of the current billing period.
driver.plan_faq_upgrade_a: Your new cap takes effect immediately. Any remaining days are prorated.
driver.plan_faq_unlimited_a: No monthly booking cap. You can accept as many rides as you like.
driver.plan_faq_fleet_a: Fleet is for operators managing multiple vehicles. Contact us for custom pricing.
driver.cap_reached_hint: You've reached your monthly booking cap. Upgrade to continue accepting rides.
driver.messages_empty: No messages yet. Our team will contact you here if we need anything.

account.title: Account
account.delete_confirm_body: This will permanently delete your account and cancel any active bookings. This cannot be undone.
account.delete_failed: Could not delete your account. Try again.
account.logout_confirm: You will be signed out of your account.

consent.title: Help us improve Mauritian Rides
consent.body: We use anonymous analytics to understand how the app is used and fix issues faster. No personal data is sold. You can change this at any time in your account settings.

driver_signup.title: Become a driver
driver_signup.mobile_hint: Riders reach you here once a ride is matched.
driver_signup.nid_hint: Exactly 13 alphanumeric characters from your National Identity Card
driver_signup.address_hint: Your registered home address in Mauritius
driver_signup.consent_verify: I consent to Mauritian Rides verifying my ID, driving licence, and PSV with the Civil Status Division and NLTA. I've read the Driver Terms and Privacy Notice.
driver_signup.consent_commission: I understand Mauritian Rides takes 0% commission. Riders pay me directly at the end of each trip.
driver_signup.error_mobile: Enter a valid Mauritian mobile number starting with 5.
driver_signup.error_year: Enter a valid year (2012 or newer).
driver_signup.error_consent_verify: You must confirm this to continue.
driver_signup.error_consent_commission: You must agree to the commission terms.
driver_signup.success_sub: Your driver account is ready. We'll verify your documents before your first ride.

packages.hero_sub: Pick the plan that matches how busy you are. Start free — no card needed. Upgrade any time from your driver dashboard.
packages.load_error: Could not load packages. Please try again.
packages.cta_sub: Sign up once, get verified in 48 hours, and start receiving bookings.

blog.hero_sub: Routes, tips, and local knowledge for getting around the island.
blog.empty_state: No articles found. Check back soon.
blog.cta_sub: Book a trusted driver in minutes. No upfront payment.

contact.title: Contact Mauritian Rides
contact.subtitle: Questions about a booking, becoming a driver, or anything else — we're here.
contact.talk_body: The fastest way to reach us is WhatsApp. For non-urgent enquiries, use the form below and we'll reply within one business day.
contact.form_note: We reply by email or WhatsApp within one business day.
contact.form_success: Thanks — your message has been sent. We will be in touch shortly.
contact.form_error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.form_error_message: Please enter a message (at least 10 characters).
contact.form_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
